user_query: I completely forgot about souvenirs. Add a stop at Roots or the Hudson's Bay flagship on Day 10 morning before the CN Tower. I need to grab gifts before I fly out.

fields.name: Hudson's Bay Flagship — Souvenir Shopping
fields.description: Visit the Hudson's Bay flagship store to pick up Canadian souvenirs, maple products, and giftable clothing/accessories before heading to the CN Tower and the airport. Convenient one-stop shop for last-minute gifts.
highlights: Wide selection of gifts and apparel
Convenient central location before CN Tower

insertion_point.reasoning: User requested a morning shopping stop before the CN Tower to grab gifts. Inserting at position 1 places this after hotel breakfast (7:30–8:15) and before the CN Tower EdgeWalk at 10:00 AM, leaving time to shop and travel.
